creator: mirya@matrix.ua
text:
As stated in the title. All dependant ports are up to report date
(including mysql51-client, postgresql81-client, libical installed)
make w/o smsd doesn't trigger any problems

Fix: 

none so far
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/comms/gnokii
# make WITH_SMSD=yes
..
(cd .libs && rm -f libmysql.la && ln -s ../libmysql.la libmysql.la)
/bin/sh ../libtool --mode=link cc -L/usr/local/lib smsd.lo lowlevel.lo -L../common -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local -pthread -lical -lusb -lbluetooth  /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libintl.so /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lXpm -lX11 -lroken -lcrypt -pthread -L/usr/local/lib -lglib-2.0 -liconv   -s -rdynamic -L../common -lgnokii -pthread -o smsd
cc .libs/smsd.o .libs/lowlevel.o -pthread /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libintl.so /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -pthread -s -rdynamic -pthread -o smsd  -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/ports/comms/gnokii/work/gnokii-0.6.14/common -L/usr/local /usr/local/lib/libusb.so -L/usr/X11R6/lib /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so /usr/local/lib/libintl.so /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so /usr/local/lib/libgnokii.so -L/usr/ports/comms/gnokii/work/gnokii-0.6.12/common /usr/local/lib/libical.so -lbluetooth -lXpm -lX11 -lroken -lcrypt  -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -Wl,--rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib
.libs/lowlevel.o(.text+0x73): In function `busterminate':
: undefined reference to `gn_lib_library_free'
.libs/lowlevel.o(.text+0x81): In function `busterminate':
: undefined reference to `gn_lib_phone_close'
.libs/lowlevel.o(.text+0x8f): In function `busterminate':
: undefined reference to `gn_lib_phoneprofile_free'
.libs/lowlevel.o(.text+0x97): In function `busterminate':
: undefined reference to `gn_lib_library_free'
.libs/lowlevel.o(.text+0x585): In function `Connect':
: undefined reference to `gn_lib_phoneprofile_load'
.libs/lowlevel.o(.text+0x5ab): In function `Connect':
: undefined reference to `gn_lib_phone_open'
.libs/lowlevel.o(.text+0x999): In function `Connect':
: undefined reference to `gn_lib_library_free'
.libs/lowlevel.o(.text+0x9c9): In function `Connect':
: undefined reference to `gn_lib_phone_close'
.libs/lowlevel.o(.text+0x9d3): In function `Connect':
: undefined reference to `gn_lib_phoneprofile_free'
gmake: *** [smsd] Помилка 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/comms/gnokii
